skill.name: culture-index
skill.description: Index, search, and retrieve organizational culture documentation for team values, practices, and guidelines.
skill.summary: Find relevant culture guidance across team documentation.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged hardcoded URLs and weak cryptographic algorithm patterns in SKILL.md. The URLs are GitHub source and resource references, and the weak crypto matches are false positives in descriptive text. No prompt injection, command execution, credential access, scripts, or runtime network behavior was found.

low_findings.title: Passive GitHub URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs point to GitHub source and resource pages. They are documentation references, not runtime network calls or data transfer endpoints.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both URLs are visible GitHub references in metadata and resources. There is no code that fetches those URLs or sends data to them.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Pattern False Positive
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptographic algorithm patterns, but the referenced lines contain metadata and descriptive skill text. No cryptographic function or security-sensitive hashing is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The relevant lines describe indexing and searching culture documentation. They do not reference MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, or any cryptographic operation.

content.value_statement: Culture guidance is often scattered across documents and hard to apply consistently. This skill helps index, search, and retrieve culture guidance for team decisions.
actual_capabilities: Organizes culture-related documents into a searchable structure.
Helps locate relevant values, practices, and guidelines.
Supports retrieval of specific culture guidance from provided materials.
Assists with building a culture documentation knowledge base.
Summarizes matching guidance for team reference.
limitations: It does not include a built-in search engine or persistent index.
It can only use documents that the user provides or makes available.
It does not verify whether culture policies are current or approved.
It does not replace human judgment for sensitive workplace issues.

use_cases.title: Find Onboarding Guidance
use_cases.description: Help new employees find values, expectations, and team practices from existing culture documents.

use_cases.title: Prepare Team Decisions
use_cases.description: Retrieve relevant culture principles before planning process changes or team rituals.

use_cases.title: Build a Culture Knowledge Base
use_cases.description: Organize scattered culture documents into topics that are easier to search and maintain.

prompt_templates.title: Find Culture Guidance
prompt_templates.prompt: Search the provided culture documents for guidance about [topic]. Summarize the most relevant values, practices, and guidelines.

prompt_templates.title: Create an Index Plan
prompt_templates.scenario: Organize a small culture document set.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review these culture documents and propose an index with topics, document names, and short descriptions for each topic.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Culture Practices
prompt_templates.scenario: Analyze related guidance across multiple files.
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the guidance about [practice] across these culture documents. Identify consistent themes, conflicts, and missing details.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Retrieval Workflow
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced setup for repeatable culture searches.
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a repeatable workflow for indexing, searching, and updating our culture documentation. Include topic taxonomy, review steps, and ownership.

output_examples.input: Search for guidance about remote meeting expectations.
output_examples.output: The skill returns a concise summary of meeting norms, relevant document names, and suggested follow-up questions.

output_examples.input: Create an index for onboarding and team values documents.
output_examples.output: The skill produces topic groups such as values, communication, decision making, onboarding, and manager expectations.

output_examples.input: Compare guidance about feedback across three documents.
output_examples.output: The skill highlights shared principles, notes conflicting advice, and lists areas that need owner review.

best_practices: Provide the latest approved culture documents before asking for search or indexing.
Ask for source document names when using results for policy or onboarding work.
Review summaries with document owners before sharing them as official guidance.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to infer policies from missing or outdated documents.
Do not treat search summaries as legal or human resources advice.
Do not include confidential employee data unless it is required and approved.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps organize, search, and retrieve guidance from culture documentation.

faq.question: Does it create a persistent index?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides workflow guidance, but it does not include storage or a search service.

faq.question: Can it search private company documents?
faq.answer: Only if the user provides those documents or makes them available in the current workspace.

faq.question: Can it verify policy accuracy?
faq.answer: No. It can summarize available documents, but owners should confirm official policy details.

faq.question: Which tools support this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The audit found only passive documentation links and false positive crypto matches.
